title: chiloschista phyllorhiza
intro: Chiloschista phyllorhiza, also known as the Phyllorhiza orchid, is an epiphytic orchid species native to Australia and New Caledonia. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Australia, where it has been employed for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Chiloschista phyllorhiza include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, skin protection, and immune system support. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can be used in various forms, including capsules, tablets, or topical creams.
